name: Accelerant Holdings
business: Accelerant operates a data-driven risk exchange that connects specialty insurance underwriters (Members, typically MGAs) with Risk Capital Partners (insurers, reinsurers, institutional investors). It generates revenue through fees from Risk Capital Partners for sourcing, managing, and monitoring risks, commissions from owned MGAs, and underwriting profit from retained business.
sellsTo: Risk Capital Partners (insurers, reinsurers, institutional investors)

exposures.sentence: We operate a data-driven risk exchange that connects selected specialty insurance underwriters (the Sellers on our platform) with Risk Capital Partners (the Buyers on our platform).

catalysts.event: Upsizing of Flywheel Re reinsurance treaty with additional capital from institutional investors
catalysts.sentence: The Flywheel Re reinsurance treaty has been extended and upsized through additional capital from new and existing institutional investors, with the most recent upsizing in March 2026 to support business assumed by Flywheel Re over a multi-year risk period scheduled to end in 2028.

tamClaims.claim: Current serviceable market for low-volatility, low-severity SME commercial risks in focal lines and geographies is estimated at $117 billion of premium for 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: This market segment within our focal lines of business and geographies is large, estimated at $117 billion of premium for 2022, giving us considerable room to expand.

tamClaims.claim: Expanding into selected additional lines of business would bring serviceable market to $252 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We intend to prudently expand into selected additional lines of business, bringing our estimated serviceable market to $252 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Captive insurance companies constitute a $176 billion global market.
tamClaims.sentence: In particular, captive insurance companies constitute a $176 billion global market and face similar challenges as our existing specialty Members.
